features: Protects milk and new big teeth
description: Product Description Aquafresh Kids Splash Strawberry Toothpaste 50ml Ingredients Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, PEG-6, Aroma, Xanthan Gum, Titanium Dioxide, Carrageenan, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Saccharin, Cl 73360. Contains: Sodium Fluoride 0.315% w/w (1450 ppm Fluoride). Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to the toothbrush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Consult a dentist in case of irritation. Manufacturer Contact Information Haleon, Building 5, First Floor the Heights Weybridge Surrey KT13 0NY See more
